#  Announcing the Release of Apache Flink 1.20
August 2, 2024 - Weijie Guo (@WeijieGuo12) Rui Fan (@1996fanrui)
The Apache Flink PMC is pleased to announce the release of Apache Flink 1.20.0. As usual, we are looking at a packed release wit…
